ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "city_ascii" TEXT /* ASCII version of the city name */,
  "state_id" TEXT /* ID of the state where the city is located */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the city */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the city data (e.g., polygon) */,
  "military" INTEGER /* Whether the city has a military presence */,
  "incorporated" INTEGER /* Whether the city is incorporated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the city */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the city in square miles */,
  "water_area" REAL /* Water area of the city in square miles */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city in feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" TEXT /* ID of the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "state_id" TEXT /* ID of the state where the county is located */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* County seat of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the zip code is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code value */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of zip code (e.g., standard, PO box) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coordinates" (
  "coord_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coordinates */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the coordinates are located */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "geohash" TEXT /* Geohash of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coord_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coordinates_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timezones" (
  "timezone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timezone */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the timezone is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone value */,
  "offset" REAL /* Offset from UTC in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timezone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timezones_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access event */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the city data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the city data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "census_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the census data is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city according to census data */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the city according to census data */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the city according to census data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the economic indicator is located */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the city */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the city */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polygon_data" (
  "polygon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polygon data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the polygon data is located */,
  "polygon" TEXT /* Polygon coordinates of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the polygon in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polygon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polygon_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_county" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., city, town, village) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id", "county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the data source is located */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
